'''''Classic Star Wars: A Long Time Ago...'' 4''' is the fourth volume in the [[Dark Horse Comics]] black-and-white collections of the original [[Marvel Comics]] series of comic books.

==Contents==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 68|''Star Wars'' (1977) 68]]
*[[Star Wars (1977) 69|''Star Wars'' (1977) 69]]
*[[Star Wars (1977) 79|''Star Wars'' (1977) 79]]
*[[Star Wars (1977) 81|''Star Wars'' (1977) 81]]
